BindPhysicalDedicatedLine.etGatewayId: The ID of the dedicated line gateway
BindPhysicalDedicatedLine.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string no longer than 64 characters, see ClientToken Idempotency for details
BindPhysicalDedicatedLine.etId: The ID of the physical dedicated line to bind; etId and channelId must be provided together
BindPhysicalDedicatedLine.channelId: The ID of the dedicated line channel to bind; etId and channelId must be provided together
BindPhysicalDedicatedLine.localCidrs: The cloud-side network of the dedicated line gateway; users can select the current VPC CIDR block or specify one or more custom CIDR blocks
